scripts.dev:clean: powershell -Command "5000,5173,5174 | ForEach-Object { Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }" && npm run dev
scripts.build:render: npm install --include=dev && npm install --prefix client --include=dev && npm install --prefix server && npm run build
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run start --prefix server
scripts.install:all: npm install --include=dev && npm install --prefix client --include=dev && npm install --prefix server --include=dev
